![][image1]

**List of building-related sponsored standards**

Below is a list of the 134 standards the Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment have sponsored PDF access to. The list is divided into current and superseded categories. When you are searching for a standard on the sponsored standards landing page you will only get the current standard in your search results. If you click into the current standard you will find a list of the superseded versions that have also been sponsored.

**Current Standards**

|  | Standard Number | Item description |
| :---: | :---- | :---- |
| 1 | NZS 1170.5:2004 | Structural design actions – Part 5: Earthquake actions – New Zealand |
| 2 | NZS 1170.5 Supp 1:2004 (Excludes Amdt 1\) | Structural design actions – Part 5: Earthquake actions – New Zealand Commentary |
| 3 | NZS 2295:2006 | Pliable, permeable building underlays |
| 4 | NZS 3101.1&2:2006 | Concrete structures standard |
| 5 | NZS 3106:1986 | Code of practice for concrete structures for the storage of liquids |
| 6 | NZS 3106:2009 | Design of concrete structures for the storage of liquids |
| 7 | NZS 3109:1997 | Concrete construction |
| 8 | NZS 3112.2:1986 | Methods of test for concrete – Tests relating to the determination of strength of concrete |
| 9 | NZS 3114:1987 | Specification for concrete surface finishes |
| 10 | NZS 3116:2002 | Concrete segmental and flagstone paving |
| 11 | NZS 3404 Parts 1 and 2:1997 | Steel structures standard |
| 12 | SNZ TS 3404:2018 | Durability requirements for steel structures and components |
| 13 | NZS 3501:1976 | Specification for copper tubes for water, gas, and sanitation |
| 14 | NZS 3602:2003 | Timber and wood-based products for use in building |
| 15 | NZS 3604:2011 | Timber-framed buildings |
| 16 | NZS 3605:2001 | Timber piles and poles for use in building |
| 17 | NZS 3617:1979 | Specification for profiles of weatherboards, fascia boards, and flooring |
| 18 | NZS 3622:2004 | Verification of timber properties |
| 19 | NZS 3631:1988 | New Zealand timber grading rules |
| 20 | NZS 3640:2003 | Chemical preservation of round and sawn timber |
| 21 | NZS 3902:2004 | Housing, alterations and small buildings contract |
| 22 | NZS 4121:2001 | Design for access and mobility – Buildings and associated facilities |
| 23 | NZS 4206:1992 | Concrete interlocking roofing tiles |
| 24 | NZS 4210:2001 | Masonry construction – Materials and workmanship |

| 25 | SNZ TS 4211:2022 | Classification for the performance of windows |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 26 | NZS 4214:2006 | Methods of determining the total thermal resistance of parts of buildings |
| 27 | NZS 4217:1980 | Pressed metal tile roofs |
| 28 | NZS 4218:2004 | Energy efficiency – Small building envelope |
| 29 | NZS 4218:2009 | Thermal insulation – Housing and small buildings |
| 30 | NZS 4219:2009 | Seismic performance of engineering systems in buildings |

| 36 | NZS 4229:2013 | Concrete masonry buildings not requiring specific engineering design |
| 37 | NZS 4230:2004 | Design of reinforced concrete masonry structures |
| 38 | NZS 4232.2:1988 | Performance criteria for fire resisting enclosures – Part 2: Fire resisting glazing systems |
| 39 | SNZ HB 4236:2002 | Masonry veneer wall cladding |
| 40 | NZS 4243.1:2007 | Energy efficiency – Large buildings – Building thermal envelope |
| 41 | NZS 4243.2:2007 | Energy efficiency – Large buildings – Part 2: Lighting |
| 42 | NZS 4246:2016 | Energy efficiency – Installing bulk thermal insulation in residential buildings |
| 43 | NZS 4251.1:2007 | Solid plastering – Cement plasters for walls, ceilings and soffits |

| 47 | NZS 4303:1990 | Ventilation for acceptable indoor air quality |
| 48 | NZS 4304:2002 | Management of Healthcare Waste |
| 49 | NZS 4305:1996 | Energy efficiency – Domestic type hot water systems |
| 50 | NZS 4332:1997 | Non-domestic passenger and goods lifts |
| 51 | NZS 4334:2012 | Platform lifts and low-speed lifts |
| 52 | NZS 4402.2.2:1986 | Methods of testing soils for civil engineering purposes – Soil classification tests – Test 2.2 Determination of the liquid limit |

| 55 | NZS 4402.2.8.2:1986 | Methods of testing soils for civil engineering purposes – Soil classification tests – Test 2.8.2 Subsidiary method by dry sieving |

| 57 | NZS 4402.2.8.4:1986 | Methods of testing soils for civil engineering purposes – Soil classification tests – Test 2.8.4 Subsidiary method for fine soils (hydrometer method) |
